headerDisplay: Connects Homebridge to a Vera (MiCasaVerde / Ezlo) controller over the local Luup HTTP API. Local-network access only — no cloud account required.
footerDisplay: For help and the device-type support matrix see the [README](https://github.com/mckdevnull/homebridge-vera2#readme).

name.title: Name
name.description: Platform name shown in the Homebridge logs.

host.title: Vera Host / IP
host.description: The local IP address or hostname of your Vera controller.

pollTimeoutSeconds.title: Long-poll timeout (seconds)
pollTimeoutSeconds.description: How long the controller holds each incremental update request open before returning. Higher = less traffic.

pollMinimumDelayMs.title: Long-poll minimum delay (ms)
pollMinimumDelayMs.description: Minimum time the controller waits before returning a change, to coalesce bursts.

hideScenes.title: Hide Scenes
hideScenes.description: Do not expose Vera scenes as momentary switches.

hideHouseMode.title: Hide House Mode
hideHouseMode.description: Do not expose the controller House Mode as a Security System accessory.

exposeArmDisarm.title: Expose Arm/Disarm switches
exposeArmDisarm.description: For armable security sensors, expose an additional switch to arm/disarm the sensor.

includeDeviceIds.title: Include only these device IDs
includeDeviceIds.description: If you add any numbers here, ONLY those Vera devices are exposed (everything else is hidden). Leave empty to expose all. Find a device's number in the Homebridge log line — Adding "<name>" (Vera device <number>) … — or in the Apple Home app under the accessory's Settings → Serial Number, shown as vera-<number>.

excludeDeviceIds.title: Exclude these device IDs
excludeDeviceIds.description: Vera device numbers to hide from HomeKit. Click + Add, type the number, and save. Find a device's number in the Homebridge log line — Adding "<name>" (Vera device <number>) … — or via the accessory's Serial Number (vera-<number>) in the Apple Home app. Excluded devices are removed on the next restart.
